scripts.dev: bun run build:remotes && concurrently -n host,tarefas,dashboard,equipe -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "bun run dev:host" "bun run serve:tarefas" "bun run serve:dashboard" "bun run serve:equipe"
scripts.build: bun run build:remotes && bun run build:host
scripts.build:remotes: concurrently "cd apps/tarefas && bun run build" "cd apps/dashboard && bun run build" "cd apps/equipe && bun run build"
scripts.preview: concurrently "cd apps/tarefas && bun run preview" "cd apps/dashboard && bun run preview" "cd apps/equipe && bun run preview" "cd apps/host && bun run preview"
